title: A Firewall for AI agents with auditing
abstract:
Hi all,

As there are more and more agents in the internet; Security is going to be a big problem. Currently, the problem is solved using a LLM to guard Agent but this creates the problem of hallucination and latency, so I coded a firewall in rust that runs under five miliseconds. This works by cre
abstract_zh: 嘿伙计们，互联网里的智能代理越来越多，安全问题已经升级成“智障”问题了！别担心，我用 Rust 语言给你编织了一个超快的防火墙（只有五毫秒），专门对付那些乱跑的 AI 代理。这招不仅堵住了漏洞，还让它们闭上了爱幻想的大嘴。现在，上网更安全，做梦也得老实点！
